entries.title: Themes admin list showing Corporate.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/theme-corporate with Foundation Theme and creating a Corporate theme record in the isolated demo harness.
entries.useCase: An administrator sees the Corporate theme record in the host Themes admin surface.

entries.title: Frontend page rendered with Corporate theme.
entries.notes: Capture the isolated demo route that renders navigation, hero, features, proof, content listing, CTA, and footer through the Corporate renderer.
entries.useCase: A visitor sees a seeded public page rendered through every Corporate theme section.

entries.title: Theme preview URL output.
entries.notes: Capture a temporary signed preview URL generated from the host Themes table for the Corporate theme.
entries.useCase: An administrator opens a preview URL to inspect a page with the Corporate theme applied.
